DEFENDANT HUNTER STANLEY STEVENSON (AKA HUNTER STEVENSON) AND MICHAEL WARREN COLE (AKA MICHAEL COLE) ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE EITHER A PROOF OF SERVICE OR DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE DETAILING REASONABLE EFFORTS AT SERVICE, OR THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED ON MAY 30, 2025. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: NOT IN. PER RESIDENT: THE PLAINTIFF, DAVID, IS THE LANDLORD AT THIS ADDRESS AND ONLY RECIEVES MAIL THERE. THE RESIDENT SAID THE LANDLORD WAS ALREADY NOTIFIED OF THE SERVICE ATTEMPTS PREVIOUSLY. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL.
